meaning: adj.外面的,下台的,出局的adv.在外,出声地,显露出来地,明显地,从头至尾地n.外面,外出,外观vt.赶出,击倒,使退场vi.外出,暴露 prep.通过
examples: If you're going out tonight you'll have to count me out.
Out of those 70% were domestic visitors and 30% were from overseas, the report said.
There are also a handful of small plates like the stand-out braised pork belly with cider.
